programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1
programme.desc: When the Jelly Beans lose their new pet snake in their cabin, Patsy shows up to save the campers from being swallowed one by one by the vicious little garter snake.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3
programme.desc: Adam spearheads the United Species, an animal version of the United Nations. Upset that his pal is spending more time with the United Species than with him, Jake determines to bring the organization down.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3
programme.desc: Adam and Jake try to determine which one of them is the other's sidekick. The resulting contest to determine friendship dominance leads other students and teachers to question their roles.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3
programme.desc: Confused by gorilla mating rules, Windsor runs scared from a female gorilla named Deb, fearful that if he even speaks to her, he'll be forced to marry her one day, since gorillas mate for life.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3
programme.desc: Jake switches places with his spoiled cousin, SAUCY, and lives the life at a popstar's palace. Meanwhile, Adam has to contend with the annoying Saucy.

programme.title: Must Love Dogs
programme.desc: A lady sets out to change her single status by putting up a personal ad but realises she has too much to handle when men respond to the ad.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: In this new action-packed chapter the now-reformed Bad Guys are forced to pull one last heist, masterminded by a new team of criminals: The Bad Girls.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: An accident strands Rodney on a deserted island. Except it's the kind of 'island' you find in the street.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: The night before he's to give an important speech, Mr. J loses his voice while laughing too hard at a silly singing cow movie that Rodney insisted he watch.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Andy tries to bridge the gap between Rodney and his father through the timeless art of karaoke.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney's attempt to fix the air conditioner goes terribly wrong, leaving him trapped in the walls of the house.

programme.title: Sesame Street S55
programme.desc: On a really hot day, Abby makes a snowman to help keep her and Elmo cool.

programme.title: Sesame Street S55
programme.desc: Reporter Elmo and Reporter Abby take part in Nursery Rhyme Day on Sesame Street.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1
programme.desc: The Jelly Beans disappoint Slinkman when they spend all their box car money, but they redeem themselves by winning the race anyway using their own original contraption!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1
programme.desc: Raj loses his teeth retainer and spends the campers' entire float trip neurotically obsessing over the orthodontic device--until Lazlo snaps him out of it.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1
programme.desc: Lazlo finds a wig and pretends he's a swami making predictions, but the campers are truly spooked when the predictions come true.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1
programme.desc: When Lumpus won't give Slinkman the night off, Lazlo helps Slinkman finally stand up to his boss.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1
programme.desc: The Jelly Beans discover they are genius hot dog makers, and the camp 'fame' goes straight to their heads!

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3
programme.desc: When Principal Pixiefrog wins the Principal of the Year Award, his ego goes through the roof, eventually becoming too big for CDMS to handle.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3
programme.desc: After Principal Pixiefrog loses his voice, he needs a replacement to do the morning announcements. Adam and Jake fill in, and become popular morning Middle School Shock Jocks!

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3
programme.desc: Adam gets a day job as a used car lot costumed gorilla, offending his friends in the process.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey S3
programme.desc: When a new substitute teacher arrives at CDMS, Jake meets his first love and his first broken heart.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Jack Black is Po, the unlikely hero chosen to fulfill an ancient kung fu prophecy in this delightful animation voiced by a star-studded cast.

programme.title: Bad News Bears
programme.desc: A hot-headed baseball coach finds his work cut out when he takes upon a new coaching assignment with a team that is way below par.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall
programme.desc: Two teenagers on the cusp of adulthood meet and fall in love over four significant days of the year.

programme.title: The Titan Games S1
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Guy is always surprising Eep with romantic gestures and Eep wants to return the favor. But when Guy proves impossible to surprise, Eep has to step up her game.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade rush to warn the Emperor about the weasels, but he has Po arrested and Colin captures Blade, revealing that she was never a knight. Thrown in a cell, Po reunites with Rukhmini and Mr. Ping, and he copes with the truth about Blade as they break out. Po fights Klaus and Veruca but is outmatched. Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: After losing their mission materials in quicksand, Tony decides to channel Dom and Blend in to get intel from the people of Rio. Unfortunately it's more difficult than he expected, and Tony and his crew are picked up by a group of favela gangsters in a neighborhood that worships a mysterious young female martyr. The crew is relieved to find that Layla is in charge of the gangsters - until she orders the gangsters to dispose of them!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony is convinced that Layla is deep undercover and tries to talk to her alone to get through to her. Meanwhile, the crew investigates the gang’s production of the mysterious formula from the tattoo. When Frostee discovers that the product of the formula is unstable and will explode, Tony has to save Layla, who is driving a whole truck of it!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: During her last days on Earth, Aja decides to tell Steve the truth: she's an alien. But her plans are complicated when the Zerons abduct Aja, Steve and Krel. Meanwhile, Vex struggles with an impossible choice: saving the Royal teens or the Royal Cores.

programme.desc: Three chefs, joined by their manager and assistant, travel to Hong Kong for inspiration. In this cultural crossroads, they meet remarkable people, discover new stories, and create fresh “recipes for life".

programme.title: Handsome Guys
programme.desc: The cast travels across South Korea, discovering unique culture, nature, magical places, and fascinating people. Each episode features different guests, joining in the joyful journey.

programme.title: Six Singles Under One Roof
programme.desc: Six single celebrities in their 40s choose co-living in Gugi-dong as “Life Mates,” sharing laughter, challenges, and fresh memories while redefining modern family through friendship.

programme.title: French Connections
programme.desc: French Connections revolves around France, its top stories and news, its experience in various spheres and cultural life, sport events, health care and education, cuisine and so much more. Find out what is like to live in France, get to know its regions, and feel the true taste of France.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Truth or Fake
programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. The Truth or Fake is a short program designed to alert everyone to the dangers of fake news. The hosts emphasize that media literacy is a key part of the broad fight against disinformation.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.desc: A multinational company is determined to evacuate the city of Detroit to build their pet project called Delta City. RoboCop must fight the mega corporation and help the people of Detroit.

programme.title: Casablanca
programme.desc: Rick Blaine owns a nightclub in Vichy controlled Casablanca, frequented by refugees desperate to escape German domination. Despite the ever-present human misery, Rick manages to remain uninvolved in World War II now raging across Europe and Northern Africa. But all that changes when Ilsa Lund walks through the front door of Rick's club. Rick must now choose between a life with the woman he loves and becoming the hero that both she and the world need.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 143

programme.title: The Cube Australia - EP 3
programme.desc: Hosted by Andy Lee,, The Cube Australia sees competing pairs have nine lives to complete seven games, each worth an increasing amount of money, as they move closer to the huge jackpot. With key moments filmed using state-of-the-art bullet time’ 3D time-freezing technology, it is more than a regular game show. It brings blockbuster visuals and Hollywood high tension direct to your living room. Will anyone have what it takes to beat the Cube?

Biowell Vital Fish Oil 针对三高族群设计，含有高达97%纯度的Omega-3，并特别添加红曲，有助于维护心、血管健康、维护胆固醇、有助于稳定血压和血糖。Biowell concentrated Fish Oil, 95%高纯度浓缩鱼油；富含DHA并添加叶黄素，有助提升专注力、保护视力、缓解眼睛干涩疲劳，脑眼双补！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE’s Bio-Ray Knee Guard with Tourmaline
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear. 护膝提供膝盖周围稳固支撑与轻柔加压，分担关节压力，减少磨损。结合日本生化能技术与托玛琳微热作用，促进血气循环、舒缓僵硬, 让膝盖在日常走动、运动中都保持稳定与健康， 降低磨损和退化风险。 透气材质，天天戴都舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Kampo Premium Cordyceps & Bitter Melon Triple Cleanse
programme.desc: The bitter melon formula supports natural detoxification, helps balance blood sugar, and promotes healthy metabolism. The cordyceps capsules boost energy, nourish blood health, and strengthen immunity. Carefully formulated with selected herbal extracts and GMP-certified, these supplements are ideal for daily wellness and long-term natural health maintenance. Health+ 日本汉方苦瓜三清素帮你清热解毒、平衡血糖、促进代谢，Health+ 日本汉方至尊虫草胶囊补气养血、提升免疫力和精力。精选草本精华，GMP认证，天天养生也安心，长期调理体质更自然健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Kampo CholesGuard
programme.desc: A premium, natural supplement trusted globally for over 20 years. You could claim a full refund if you do not see results in 30 days. 一款享誉全球20余年的优质天然保健品。它结合了红曲（莫纳可林K）和高活性纳豆激酶，有助于将胆固醇维持在健康水平。添加丹参和野生山药，有助于增强血管弹性，减轻心脏负担。本产品不含毒素，可长期服用，安全可靠。提供30天安心保证，如30天后未见效，全额退款。
